requirement_topic.en: Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment — PTA Mandatory Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电/电信终端设备——PTA强制型式认可
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電/電信終端設備——PTA強制型式認可

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment — including Wi-Fi devices, Bluetooth devices, cellular handsets and modules, IoT gateways, routers, and any product that transmits or receives radio signals — must obtain a PTA (Pakistan Telecommunication Authority) Type Approval Certificate before importation or sale in Pakistan. The legal basis is the Pakistan Telecommunication (Re-organization) Act 1996 and associated PTA Type Approval Regulations. PTA administers its own independent national type approval scheme and does not recognise CE, FCC, or CCC approvals as substitutes. Applications are submitted through PTA's online Type Approval System (PTAS); the applicant must be a licensed Pakistani importer or authorised dealer — a foreign manufacturer cannot apply directly. PTA manages spectrum allocation for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands; ISM-band use is subject to PTA type approval, not a general licence. A separate PTA type approval is required for each device model. The certificate must appear in import declarations and is verified by Pakistan Customs.
summary.zh: 所有无线电和电信终端设备——包括Wi-Fi设备、蓝牙设备、蜂窝手机及模块、物联网网关、路由器，以及任何发射或接收无线电信号的产品——在进口或于巴基斯坦销售前，必须取得PTA（巴基斯坦电信管理局）型式认可证书。法律依据为《1996年巴基斯坦电信（重组）法》及相关PTA型式认可法规。PTA实施独立的国家型式认可体系，不承认CE、FCC或CCC认可作为替代。申请通过PTA在线型式认可系统（PTAS）提交；申请人须为持证巴基斯坦进口商或授权经销商——外国制造商不得直接申请。PTA管理2.4 GHz和5 GHz频段的频谱分配；ISM频段使用须经PTA型式认可，而非通用许可。每个设备型号须单独取得PTA型式认可证书。证书须体现在进口申报中，并由巴基斯坦海关核验。
summary.zht: 所有無線電和電信終端設備——包括Wi-Fi設備、藍牙設備、蜂窩手機及模塊、物聯網閘道、路由器，以及任何發射或接收無線電信號的產品——在進口或於巴基斯坦銷售前，必須取得PTA（巴基斯坦電信管理局）型式認可證書。法律依據為《1996年巴基斯坦電信（重組）法》及相關PTA型式認可法規。PTA實施獨立的國家型式認可體系，不承認CE、FCC或CCC認可作為替代。申請通過PTA在線型式認可系統（PTAS）提交；申請人須為持牌巴基斯坦進口商或授權經銷商——外國製造商不得直接申請。PTA管理2.4 GHz和5 GHz頻段的頻譜分配；ISM頻段使用須經PTA型式認可，而非通用許可。每個設備型號須單獨取得PTA型式認可證書。證書須體現在進口申報中，並由巴基斯坦海關核驗。

standards_or_laws: PTA Type Approval Regulations (issued under the Act)
PTA Type Approval System (PTAS) — online application portal

summary.en: China requires radio transmitting equipment to obtain SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China, now MIIT Radio Management Bureau) radio type approval before sale or import. Telecom terminal equipment additionally requires a MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL, 进网许可证) under the Telecommunications Regulations of the People's Republic of China. Products within CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scope — including certain Wi-Fi routers and IT equipment — must also obtain CCC from CNCA. GB standards (GB 9254 / GB 17625 for EMC; GB 4943 for safety) form the technical baseline. The SRRC and MIIT-NAL system is the closest Chinese analogue to PTA type approval but operates under entirely separate regulations and is not recognised by PTA.
summary.zh: 中国要求无线电发射设备在销售或进口前取得SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会，现为工业和信息化部无线电管理局）无线电型式核准。电信终端设备另须依据《中华人民共和国电信条例》取得工业和信息化部进网许可证（NAL）。纳入CCC（中国强制认证）范围的产品——包括部分Wi-Fi路由器及IT设备——还须从CNCA取得CCC认证。GB标准（EMC：GB 9254 / GB 17625；安全：GB 4943）构成技术基准。SRRC及MIIT-NAL体系是与PTA型式认可最接近的中国对应制度，但完全依据独立法规运作，不被PTA认可。
summary.zht: 中國要求無線電發射設備在銷售或進口前取得SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會，現為工業和信息化部無線電管理局）無線電型式核准。電信終端設備另須依據《中華人民共和國電信條例》取得工業和信息化部進網許可證（NAL）。納入CCC（中國強制認證）範圍的產品——包括部分Wi-Fi路由器及IT設備——還須從CNCA取得CCC認證。GB標準（EMC：GB 9254 / GB 17625；安全：GB 4943）構成技術基準。SRRC及MIIT-NAL體系是與PTA型式認可最接近的中國對應制度，但完全依據獨立法規運作，不被PTA認可。

standards_or_laws: MIIT / SRRC Radio Type Approval (无线电型式核准) — MIIT Radio Management Bureau
MIIT Network Access Licence (进网许可证) — Telecommunications Regulations of the PRC
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA, for in-scope IT and radio equipment

gap.en: PTA operates a fully independent national type approval scheme. Chinese SRRC certificates, MIIT Network Access Licences, CCC certificates, CE marks, and FCC IDs are NOT recognised by PTA and cannot substitute for PTA type approval. Each device model requires a separate application through PTAS submitted by a licensed Pakistani importer or authorised dealer — a Chinese manufacturer cannot apply directly. Common gap for Chinese exporters: assuming SRRC or CE documentation satisfies PTA; it does not. PTA type approval must be secured before any shipment enters Pakistan. Delays in obtaining PTA approval are a leading cause of shipment detention or rejection at Pakistani ports of entry.
gap.zh: PTA实施完全独立的国家型式认可体系。中国SRRC证书、工业和信息化部进网许可证、CCC证书、CE标志及FCC ID均不被PTA认可，不能替代PTA型式认可。每个设备型号须由持证巴基斯坦进口商或授权经销商通过PTAS单独提交申请——中国制造商不得直接申请。中国出口商的常见误区：误以为SRRC或CE文件满足PTA要求，实则不然。PTA型式认可须在任何货物进入巴基斯坦前取得。PTA认可迟延是导致货物在巴基斯坦口岸被扣押或拒绝的主要原因之一。
gap.zht: PTA實施完全獨立的國家型式認可體系。中國SRRC證書、工業和信息化部進網許可證、CCC證書、CE標誌及FCC ID均不被PTA認可，不能替代PTA型式認可。每個設備型號須由持牌巴基斯坦進口商或授權經銷商通過PTAS單獨提交申請——中國製造商不得直接申請。中國出口商的常見誤區：誤以為SRRC或CE文件滿足PTA要求，實則不然。PTA型式認可須在任何貨物進入巴基斯坦前取得。PTA認可遲延是導致貨物在巴基斯坦口岸被扣押或拒絕的主要原因之一。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PTA Type Approval Certificate required for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before importation or sale in Pakistan under the Pakistan Telecommunication (Re-organization) Act 1996
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval required for radio transmitting equipment; MIIT Network Access Licence required for telecom terminal equipment; CCC required for in-scope products under CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] PTA Type Approval is mandatory for all Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT devices before importation or sale in Pakistan. CE, FCC, CCC, and SRRC approvals are not recognised by PTA. Applications must be submitted through PTAS by a licensed Pakistani importer or authorised dealer; the Chinese manufacturer cannot apply directly. Secure PTA type approval before shipment to avoid port detention.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] PTA型式认可对所有Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及物联网设备在巴基斯坦进口或销售前为强制要求。CE、FCC、CCC及SRRC认可均不被PTA承认。申请须由持证巴基斯坦进口商或授权经销商通过PTAS提交；中国制造商不得直接申请。须在发货前取得PTA型式认可，以避免口岸扣押。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] PTA型式認可對所有Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及物聯網裝置在巴基斯坦進口或銷售前為強制要求。CE、FCC、CCC及SRRC認可均不被PTA承認。申請須由持牌巴基斯坦進口商或授權經銷商通過PTAS提交；中國製造商不得直接申請。須在發貨前取得PTA型式認可，以避免口岸扣押。
